sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = f × Account Equity / Worst-Case Loss per Trade. Optimal f of 0.25 suggests approximately 25% fractional Kelly or conservative full Kelly equivalent. Position sizing must account for perceived worst-case loss on the next trade, not account size alone.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined as a fraction of account equity relative to the worst-case loss on the next trade, not as a simple function of account size alone.
